Verified from export_result.sh and task_utils.sh scripts which hardcode this as RESULTS_DIR.
Verified from task_utils.sh which runs RasUnsteady generating Muncie.p04.tmp.hdf and renaming it to Muncie.p04.hdf.
Verified from setup_task.sh where this exact filename is prepared and verifier.py where it's checked.

Verified from export_result.sh which copies this exact filename to the verifier.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on the standard Muncie example project provided with HEC-RAS. The model's results (WSE time series) are stored in Muncie.p04.hdf in standard HEC-RAS HDF5 format. The verifier uses an independent Python script hidden in export_result.sh to calculate the true Oscillation Index directly from the HDF file (TotalVariation / Range) and compares the agent's top unstable River Station and its index against this ground truth. The required outputs must exactly match the hardcoded paths in the environment: the Python script, the CSV report, and the plot image in the /home/ga/Documents/hec_ras_results directory.
